title: The most insane week in AI
summary: AI Search reviews multiple major AI releases in a single week including DeepSeek V4, Kimi K2.6, MiMo v2.5, GPT 5.5, GPT Images 2, and Qwen 3.6. The video covers research papers, new models, and tools across vision, language, robotics, and game-playing domains.
